claim: vLLM v1 with AWQ-INT4 Llama 3.1 8B delivers >=100 tokens per second median single-stream throughput on RTX 4090 24GB across 50 chat-singleturn prompts (publicly cited number: ~120 tok/s).
decision_rule: If CONFIRMED, vLLM + Q4 is the v1 NVIDIA default. If REFUTED, investigate quantization + batching parameters before declaring vLLM Q4 unsuitable.
